features.name: array locator method min on fixed-size unpacked array
features.description: Code should include a fixed-size unpacked array with array locator method .min() called and result displayed via $display

features.name: array locator method max on fixed-size unpacked array
features.description: Code should include a fixed-size unpacked array with array locator method .max() called and result displayed via $display

features.name: array locator methods on fixed-size unpacked arrays return queue type
features.description: Code should include a fixed-size unpacked array where array locator methods are called, demonstrating these methods should return queue type per LRM 7.12.1
